register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Set up Quelora for your website in minutes.
register.err_password_weak: Must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, a number and a special character

verify.title: Verify your email
verify.subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to {{email}}. Enter it below to continue.
verify.err_code_invalid: Invalid or expired code. Please try again.

basics.title: Tell us about your site
basics.subtitle: This information helps configure the widget for your audience.
basics.site_url_help: Full address of your site, including https://
basics.err_site_url_invalid: Enter a valid URL starting with http:// or https://

auth.title: Authentication setup
auth.subtitle: Configure how users sign in through Quelora.
auth.jwt_body: This secret links your server with Quelora. Keep it safe — never expose it in client-side code.
auth.mode_quelora_desc: Users authenticate through Quelora. No server-side login setup required.
auth.mode_custom: I have my own login system
auth.mode_custom_desc: Provide your login and logout URLs so Quelora can redirect users correctly.
auth.cms_hint: Select your CMS to pre-fill the URLs:

selectors.title: How is your content structured?
selectors.subtitle: Quelora needs to know where to find and attach to your articles.
selectors.mode_discovery_desc: Quelora detects articles automatically based on common patterns. Best for standard CMS setups.
selectors.mode_deterministic_desc: You provide exact CSS selectors. Recommended for custom-built sites.
selectors.selector_help: CSS selector wrapping each article (e.g. article, .post-card)
selectors.id_attribute_help: HTML attribute that uniquely identifies each article (e.g. id, data-url, href)
selectors.relative_to_help: CSS selector inside the article where the bar will be inserted (e.g. .entry-footer)
selectors.ai_agent_desc: Automatically analyze your site and suggest optimal selectors — coming soon

integration.title: You're all set!
integration.subtitle: Connect your WordPress site to Quelora using the automatic setup or manually.
integration.auto_hint: Copy this string and paste it in your WordPress plugin wizard for one-click setup.
integration.jwt_warning: Keep this secret on your server only. Never include it in client-side code.
integration.save_error: Could not save your configuration automatically. Your credentials are shown below.
integration.auto_step1: Install and activate the Quelora plugin in WordPress
integration.auto_step2: Go to WP Admin → Quelora → Settings
integration.auto_step3: Paste the connection string and click Save
integration.config_hint: Place this in the <head> of your site before the Quelora widget script.
integration.download_hint: Pre-compiled integration file for manual installations without a plugin.
